about.name: Puddle & Pip Cozyverse
about.description: A soft plush forest world of cozy adventures.

about.name: The AstroMochi Crew
about.description: Squishy space adventures across candy planets.

about.name: Nine Gates Mahjong Kingdom
about.description: Jade dragons, mahjong tiles and lantern festivals.

about.name: SnackStreet Squad
about.description: Neon street-food heroes, cooking rushes and scooter chaos.

about.name: Oracle Mirror Oddities
about.description: Mystical carnival magic with moon cats and tarot towers.

about.name: Mochi Mango Originals
about.description: One-off mascot games built for quick fun and merch.

about.name: Mochi Mango Retroverse
about.description: A neon-CRT universe celebrating three decades of arcade and home-game mechanics through new mascots, worlds, and stories.

about.name: Tabletop Kingdom
about.description: Wooden boards, carved pieces and classic strategy games reimagined with storybook charm.

about.name: Puzzle Realm
about.description: A kingdom of logic, memory, and wit — where every challenge sharpens the mind and rewards clever thinking.

about.name: Candy Galaxy
about.description: A sugary universe where every star is a candy and every planet is a dessert waiting to be explored.

about.name: Mango Island
about.description: A tropical paradise of sun, sand, and fruity fun — where every wave brings a new game and every palm hides a challenge.

about.name: Mochi World
about.description: A squishy, sweet universe where everything is made of mochi — from the clouds to the mountains to the friends you make along the way.

about.name: Panda Kingdom
about.description: A lush bamboo realm where gentle pandas guard ancient forests, solve nature puzzles, and embark on leaf-strewn adventures.

about.name: Pixel Playground
about.description: A neon-drenched digital dimension where pixel creatures code, compete, and crash through glitchy arcade worlds.

about.name: Petroman Petro City
about.description: A hand-drawn industrial skyline where Petroman purifies the smog of Petro City.
